SGSC Storage Conditions for 02/03/2026


Notice Text:

The following restrictions for Saltville Gas Storage Company (SGSC) will be effective for Gas Day February 3, 2026:

SGSC has restricted and sealed excess and interruptible withdrawal activity. No increases to excess or interruptible withdrawals will be allowed.

Saltville will not permit in ground transfers from Rate Schedules ISS, IPS and ILS to Rate Schedule FSS.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.


BackPrint
